description.content: A destination is any endpoint to which your webhooks can be routed.
This endpoint lists destinations, or a subset of destinations.

Manage destinations — the downstream targets (HTTP endpoints, AWS, Azure, GCP, queues) where Hookdeck delivers events. Supports auth methods, rate limiting, and path forwarding.
